results.rendered_html:
vāgurā [vā-hiṃsane urac gan ca] A trap, net, snare, toils, meshes; ko vā durjanavāgurāsu patitaḥ kṣemaṇa yātaḥ pumān  Pt. 1. 146. 
Comp.
— vṛttiḥ f. livelihood obtained by catching wild animals.
— (ttiḥ) a fowler, huntsman;  Ms. 10. 32.
